prompt.content: Interpret the request and return one to three typed candidate plans. Plans are non-authoritative. Use only exact capability_id and agent_id values from the registry. Do not infer trust or authorization.

interpreted_request.user_goal: Complete a specific defense corpus task identified as 'missing_or_auxiliary_overreach' with priority level 10.

tasks.requirement_name: Identify missing or auxiliary overreach in defense corpus.
tasks.description: Analyze the defense corpus to identify any instances of missing or auxiliary overreach.
Validate the findings from the defense corpus analysis to ensure accuracy and completeness.
Generate a report summarizing the identified missing or auxiliary overreach in the defense corpus.
Cross-reference the defense corpus findings with external data sources to confirm overreach.
Develop a mitigation plan for the identified missing or auxiliary overreach in the defense corpus.
Implement an automated system to detect missing or auxiliary overreach in the defense corpus.
